meaning: n.程度,斜度,树脂,投掷,定调,(船只)前后颠簸,倾斜,沥青vt.投,掷,向前倾跌,定位于,用沥青涂,扎营vi.搭帐篷,投掷,坠落,倾斜
examples: All too often you pitch the ball short.
He was stretchered off the pitch with a broken leg.
They couldn't play because the pitch was waterlogged.
The running track which bordered the pitch also served as a reminder of the worst aspects of Wembley.
Many visitors, surfers included, opt to pitch a tent on the campgrounds located on the edge of town.
